_doc: Scenario catalog — points (0D atoms) combined into 1D combos, composed into 2D scenario planes bound to 3D game instances. Authoritative copy lives at tetracube://scenarios; this file seeds it on server boot.

_patterns.seq: ordered run of identical atoms along a direction (N-in-a-row).
_patterns.set: unordered collection of atoms matching a shape (e.g. 2x2x2 cube).
_patterns.count: accumulate N of any atom in the allowed list.
_patterns.score: accumulate numeric score from atom weights.

_winRules.first_combo: first player to satisfy any combo wins.
_winRules.most_score: when board/time ends, highest cumulative combo score wins.
_winRules.reach_score: first to reach target score (multi or solo).

scenarios.name: CLASSIC
scenarios.desc: 4 in a row — any direction. 76 possible winning lines.

scenarios.name: BLITZ 3
scenarios.desc: First to 3 in a row wins. Fast games, sneaky angles.

scenarios.name: DIAGONAL
scenarios.desc: Only diagonal lines score. Pure spatial mastery.

scenarios.name: CUBE QUEST
scenarios.desc: First to fill a 2x2x2 cube of your pieces wins.

scenarios.name: TERRITORY
scenarios.desc: Fill the board — most winning combos wins.

scenarios.name: SPEED DROP
scenarios.desc: 10 seconds per turn. Miss it — forfeit the drop!

scenarios.name: Esplanade Lagoon
scenarios.desc: Home territory. Lazy tourists. Plenty of fish.

scenarios.name: Mangrove Maze
scenarios.desc: Tight channels. High roots. Ambush paradise.

scenarios.name: Mudflat Midnight
scenarios.desc: Night hunt on the mudflats. Stealth is key.

scenarios.name: Tidal River Rush
scenarios.desc: River in flood. Ride the current and strike fast.

scenarios.name: Reef Shallows
scenarios.desc: Saltie territory. Coral maze. Beware the shark.
